prompt: Review PR #4538 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It promotes span fields out of the meta map into a typed SpanAttributes struct.

assertions.text: Flags the CI visibility SetTag/Finish path as having a concurrency issue
Identifies at least one happy-path alignment opportunity in the changed code
Flags hardcoded string literals (like 'm') that should use named constants
Notes stale PR description, comments, or test names referencing fields not actually promoted
Flags use of init() function where a helper function called from variable initialization is preferred
